reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified a potential issue with the rename, suggesting that it might be better to introduce a new function for netlink upcalls instead of modifying an existing one.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch renames the function sunrpc_cache_pipe_upcall() to sunrpc_cache_upcall() in preparation for its future use of netlink for upcalls, allowing it to be more flexible and adaptable.
